description: VERIFIED LIVE: Vercel via your logged-in vercel.com web session (session bridge — no token to paste). Your account, teams, projects and deployments work cookie-only on the same-origin vercel.com/api. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account: user, teams, projects and deployments all returned 200 with real data.

tools.name: vercel_user
tools.description: Your Vercel account (id, email, username, plan). VERIFIED.

tools.name: vercel_projects
tools.description: Your projects. Pass teamId to scope to a team. VERIFIED.

tools.name: vercel_deployments
tools.description: Recent deployments. Pass projectId/teamId to scope. VERIFIED.
